module.name: common
module.purpose: Shared common crate root that wires reusable config loading, now-public crate-local external re-export adapters, logging, protocol models, and structure utilities; the tool schema/preview contracts now live in the protocol module and the Tool executable handle moved to the marix-host-tool crate, so common no longer owns a tool module. Concrete selectable interfaces live in child modules while lib.rs remains namespace and re-export wiring.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Owns the common crate configuration model, config-file discovery, platform detection, alias substitution, credential resolution, and runtime path normalization.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Owns now-public re-export wrappers for third-party libraries so downstream crates route third-party access through common; single ownership stays in common.

childModules.name: logging
childModules.purpose: Owns tagged log messages, logging errors, config-gated log writes, process-role path selection, log-file creation, and pruning.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: Owns shared session, task, and tool-execution protocol interface types: identifiers, signatures, session events, statuses, updates, the execution parameter package that carries an ExecutionSignature, and the ToolSchema/ToolPreview tool metadata contracts relocated from the removed tool module.

childModules.name: structure
childModules.purpose: Owns shared structural data interfaces: the generic WorkQueue and the channel helpers, whose remote NetSender/NetReceiver endpoints are now remoc rch::mpsc channels bootstrapped over a base connection handshake and shared behind std::sync::Mutex.
